zh.lifeSummary: 當Magdalene Schneider於大約1544年出生在德國爾特波格比格奧頓豪森時，她的父親Sebastian Schneider35歲，母親Katharina Hirtler30歲。她於1565年3月12日與Matthis Keifer在德國爾特波格比格奧頓豪森結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Magdalene Schneider于大约1544年出生在德国爾特波格比格奧頓豪森时，她的父亲Sebastian Schneider35岁，母亲Katharina Hirtler30岁。她于1565年3月12日与Matthis Keifer在德国爾特波格比格奧頓豪森结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Schneider
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Hans, Otto, Franz, Erwin, Fritz, Dieter, Manfred, Heinz, Alois, Ewald, Helmut.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a tailor, literally ‘cutter’, from Middle High German snīder, German Schneider, Yiddish shnayder. The same term was sometimes used to denote a woodcutter. This surname is also established in many other parts of Europe, notably in France (Alsace and Lorraine), the Netherlands, Hungary, Poland, and Czechia. In Czechia, Slovakia, Croatia, and Slovenia it is also established in Slavicized forms (see 2 below). In part, Schneider is a Gottscheerish (i.e. Gottschee German) surname, originating from the Kočevsko region in Lower Carniola, Slovenia (see Kocevar ). Compare Sneider 1, Snider 1, and Snyder 1.
Germanized form of Czech, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Šnajdr or Šnajder, and Czech Šneidr, Šneider, Šnejdr, and Šnejder, surnames of German origin (see above).

variants.name: Kocevar
meanings: Slovenian (Kočevar): habitational name for someone from the Kočevsko region in Lower Carniola, which is named after the city of Kočevje and this one with a derivative of hoja ‘fir tree’, altered under the influence of the German name of the city, Gottschee. From the 14th century until 1941, the year of their collective resettlement in the German Reich, a large part of the region was homeland of Gottscheers, descendants of German-speaking colonists with surnames of mixed German and Slovenian origin. See also Hocevar , compare Kochevar .

variants.name: Schneiders
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Wolfgang.
North German: patronymic from   Schneider  .

variants.name: Schnier
meanings: North German: variant of   Schneider  .
Jewish (Ashkenazic): from southern Yiddish shnir ‘cord, rope’ (see Schnur ).

variants.name: Schneiderman
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Ari, Meyer, Rochel, Yael, Yudel.

Americanized form of German Schneidermann, and a variant of the same Jewish (Ashkenazic) surname: variant of Schneider , with the addition of Middle High German, Middle Low German man, German Mann ‘man’. Compare Snyderman .

variants.name: Schnieder
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Bernd, Franz, Helmut.
North German: variant of   Schneider  .

variants.name: Schnyder
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Manfred.
Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Schneider  .

variants.name: Sartorius
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Ernst, Matthias.
German and Dutch: humanistic surname, a translation into Latin of German Schneider , Dutch Snijder (see Snyder ), from Latin sartor ‘tailor’.
French (Nord, Alsace, and Lorraine): Latinized form of   Sartor   ‘tailor’. Compare   Saddoris  .

variants.name: Schnettler
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Helmut, Kurt.
German (Westphalia): cognate of   Schneider  .

variants.name: Schneiderhan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Markus.
German: distinguishing occupational name meaning ‘Tailor John’, from Schneider + Han, a shortened form of Johann .

variants.name: Schnider
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Erwin, Otto.
German: variant of   Schneider  .

nameMeanings.name: Magdalene
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament: byname of Mary Magdalene. See Madeleine .

variants.name: Magdalena
meanings: New Testament. See Madeleine .

en.lifeSummary: When Magdalene Schneider was born about 1544, in Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Germany, her father, Sebastian Schneider, was 35 and her mother, Katharina Hirtler, was 30. She married Matthis Keifer on 12 March 1565, in Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Germany. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters.

fr.Werbeln, Saarlouis, Saarland, Deutschlan: Werbeln, Landkreis Saarlouis, La Sarre, Allemagne
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Magdalene Schneider est née environ 1544, à Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Sebastian Schneider, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Katharina Hirtler, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Matthis Keifer le 12 mars 1565, à Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Magdalene Schneider um 1544 in Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sebastian Schneider 35 und ihre Mutter Katharina Hirtler 30. Sie hat am 12. März 1565 in Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Deutschland Matthis Keifer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Magdalene Schneider è nata il circa 1544 nel Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Germania, sua padre, Sebastian Schneider, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Katharina Hirtler, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Matthis Keifer il 12 marzo 1565, nel Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Magdalene Schneiderが約1544年にドイツウuルッテンバーグネウエンブuルグオッテンハウセンで生まれた時，父Sebastian Schneiderは35歳，母Katharina Hirtlerは30歳であった。1565年3月12日にドイツウuルッテンバーグネウエンブuルグオッテンハウセンでMatthis Keiferと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Magdalene Schneider(이)가 대략 1544년 독일 wu르테버그 니우브u르그 오텐하우센에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sebastian Schneider(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katharina Hirtler(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1565년 3월 12일 독일 wu르테버그 니우브u르그 오텐하우센에서 Matthis Keifer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Magdalene Schneider nasceu aproximadamente 1544, em Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Sebastian Schneider, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Katharina Hirtler, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Matthis Keifer em 12 de março de 1565, em Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 6 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Magdalene Schneider родилась около 1544 г. в местности оттенаусен, неуенбuрг, вuрттембирг, Германия, её отцу по имени Sebastian Schneider было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Katharina Hirtler, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Matthis Keifer 12 марта 1565 г. в местности оттенаусен, неуенбuрг, вuрттембирг, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Magdalene Schneider nació aproximadamente 1544, en Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Alemania, su papá, Sebastian Schneider, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Katharina Hirtler, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Matthis Keifer el 12 de marzo de 1565, en Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas.
